notes:
I've finished designing the **Wanderlust Landing Page** and its accompanying **"The Warm Wanderer" Design System**. 

The page features:
- A prominent, search-first booking flow in the hero.
- Clean category navigation with rounded visual indicators.
- High-quality, welcoming photography across featured adventure cards.
- A human-centric testimonial section and a persuasive "Become a Host" call-to-action.

The design system uses a warm neutral palette and the Plus Jakarta Sans typeface to create that approachable, trustworthy Airbnb-inspired feel you were looking for. 

How does this look for a first version?
prompt: Create a travel marketplace landing page in an Airbnb-inspired direction with warm neutral backgrounds, rounded modules, approachable sans-serif typography, welcoming photography, and a search-first booking flow. Make the page feel human, trustworthy, and easy to browse.
suggestions: Add a mobile version of the landing page
Modify the color scheme to be cooler (blues and greens)
title: Wanderlust Landing Page
